The Process

From idea to box in four simple steps.

01

Share your idea

WhatsApp us anything — a reference image, a Pinterest link, or just a voice note. No brief needed. No jargon. We take it from there.

Takes 2 minutes
02

We engineer your prototype

Our team builds the keyline, structure and opening mechanism. A real physical prototype is couriered to you within 3 days.

3 days. Guaranteed.
03

You hold it and decide

Feel the weight. Check the structure - size, shape, and how it holds your product. Love it, tweak it or we start again from the brief.

Your call entirely
04

Production begins

Once approved, our CDC Printers facility moves to production. From 200 to 20,000 boxes — same obsessive care, every run.

From 200 boxes
Start your box journey

Recognition

Awarded India's Best Luxury Gift Box Manufacturer.

Boxsmith is by CDC Printers, winner of 120+ National Awards by PrintWeek and National Awards for Excellence in Printing (NAEP). This year it has been recognized with a special jury award for "Best Rigid Box Manufacturer". Not self-proclaimed. Industry-certified.

About Boxsmith

Built on legacy. Built for founders.

Boxsmith is the D2C packaging arm of CDC Printers, a Kolkata print service provider with over two decades of manufacturing excellence and more than 120 national awards. We are amongst India's most sustainable print providers, and print only on FSC- or PEFC-certified paper.

We built Boxsmith because premium packaging was gatekept behind massive minimum orders and opaque processes. Growing brands deserved better. Premium boxes from just 200 units, a real prototype in 3 days, and a system-driven, fully transparent process — including a customer portal where you track your job live, with real-time updates at every stage.

Your vision. Our two decades of craft.
Manu & Shreya Choudhury
Founders, Boxsmith  ·  Directors, CDC Printers
